ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pokemons" (
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Pokémon */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the Pokémon */,
  "base_hp" INTEGER /* Base HP (Hit Points) of the Pokémon */,
  "base_attack" INTEGER /* Base Attack stat of the Pokémon */,
  "base_defense" INTEGER /* Base Defense stat of the Pokémon */,
  "evolution_stage" INTEGER /* Evolution stage of the Pokémon (1 for unevolved, 2 for first evolution, 3 for second evolution) */,
  "can_mega_evolve" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the Pokémon can mega evolve */,
  "type_1" TEXT /* Primary type of the Pokémon */,
  "type_2" TEXT /* Secondary type of the Pokémon (nullable) */,
  "generation" INTEGER /* Generation in which the Pokémon was introduced */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the Pokémon in meters */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the Pokémon in kilograms */,
  "capture_rate" INTEGER /* Difficulty of capturing the Pokémon */,
  "gender_ratio" TEXT /* Ratio of male to female Pokémon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pokemon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evolutions" (
  "evolution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evolution record */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon that evolves */,
  "evolves_to_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon it evolves into */,
  "evolution_method" TEXT /* Method of evolution (e.g., level up, trade, stone) */,
  "required_level" INTEGER /* Level required for evolution (nullable) */,
  "required_item" TEXT /* Item required for evolution (nullable) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Specific location required for evolution (nullable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evolution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evolutions_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemons ("pokemon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evolutions_evolves_to_id FOREIGN KEY ("evolves_to_id") REFERENCES pokemons ("pokemon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "abilities" (
  "ability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ability */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon that has the ability */,
  "ability_name" TEXT /* Name of the ability */,
  "ability_description" TEXT /* Description of the ability */,
  "is_hidden" INTEGER /* Indicates if the ability is a hidden ability */,
  "effect_chance" TEXT /* Chance of the ability's effect occurring (nullable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_abilities_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemons ("pokemon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pokemons_version_history" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the game */,
  "version_release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "base_hp" INTEGER /* Base HP (Hit Points) of the Pokémon in this version */,
  "base_attack" INTEGER /* Base Attack stat of the Pokémon in this version */,
  "base_defense" INTEGER /* Base Defense stat of the Pokémon in this version */,
  "evolution_stage" INTEGER /* Evolution stage of the Pokémon in this version */,
  "can_mega_evolve" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the Pokémon can mega evolve in this version */,
  "type_1" TEXT /* Primary type of the Pokémon in this version */,
  "type_2" TEXT /* Secondary type of the Pokémon in this version (nullable) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the Pokémon in this version */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the Pokémon in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemons_version_history_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemons ("pokemon_id")
)
